WORLD CUP SCHEDULE

U11 & U12
June 19th  ·  2:30–5:15  ·  8-min group halves  ·  10-min finals

Boys on Pitches 1, 2 & 3 (top) · Girls on Pitches 4, 5 & 6 (bottom). Both run fully in parallel.

NOTES

  • Single group of six — everyone plays everyone once (5 games). The final table then sets the Final (1st v 2nd), 3rd-place (3rd v 4th) and 5th-place (5th v 6th) playoffs, so every team finishes with a placement game.
  • Group games are 8-minute halves; the placement finals step up to 10-minute halves.
  • Tiebreakers: points, then goal difference, then goals scored.
  • Two water breaks are built in — it's the hottest slot, so rolling subs and keep everyone hydrated.
  • This is the final window of the day.
